title: Intune App Configuration
description: Intune Win32 app metadata. Located at windows/intune/app.json in each title repo.

displayName.description: Application display name shown in Intune and Company Portal.

description.description: Application description shown in Company Portal.

informationUrl.description: URL for more information about the application.

privacyInformationUrl.description: URL for the application's privacy statement.

isFeatured.description: Whether to feature this app prominently in Company Portal.

notes.description: Internal notes for IT admins (not visible to end users).

owner.description: Owner or team responsible for this app in Intune.

installCommandLine.description: Command line to execute for silent install (e.g. 'Invoke-AppDeployToolkit.exe').

uninstallCommandLine.description: Command line to execute for silent uninstall.

displayVersion.description: Display version shown to end users in Company Portal.

allowAvailableUninstall.description: Whether users can uninstall from Company Portal when assigned as Available.

installContext.description: Execution context for install: system (SYSTEM account) or user (logged-in user).

restartBehavior.description: Device restart behavior after installation completes.
